title: 2026 Training Contract
description: **Vacancy details** =================== **Details** ----------- ### **2026 Training Contract \- Dublin** **Vacancy type** Emerging talent **Scheme** Training contract/Vacation scheme **Programme** Training contract **Location** Dublin **Intake year** 2026 **Who Are Browne Jacobson Ireland LLP** We’re the Irish office of the award\-winning UK law firm Browne Jacobson LLP. The Irish office works with companies doing business in and through Ireland, helping them to navigate complex legal and regulatory landscapes across multiple jurisdictions. Key practice areas include Corporate Law, Data Privacy, Digital Law, Content Regulation, Litigation, Regulatory Disputes, Real Estate, and Construction. Read more about our firm and our awards here. **We have an exciting opportunity for an aspiring solicitor at our** **Dublin office****.** In line with our continued growth, we’re looking for a trainee to join the team and commence the Professional Practice Course (PPC) with the Law Society of Ireland in September 2026\. There is also an opportunity to commence your in\-office training prior to PCC and gain in\-office training credit. **Requirements**: * Law degree (LLB), or other degree from a recognised institution. * Successful completion of all the FE1 examinations is required given the timelines. * Be an engaged and involved member of the team. * Have strong interpersonal skills and be able to build working relationships. * Have the ability to work to deadlines and under pressure. * Have proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel etc. **What We Offer** You will be joining a large, established law firm, and have the support and opportunity that comes with this, together with being able to make an impact on our Dublin team who are growing at an exciting rate. We offer a competitive benefits package and an excellent level of training. You will be working with some of the most established and exciting clients in Ireland and the wider international legal market. You will get a hands\-on experience with support from junior lawyers and senior lawyers alike. We’re here to help you shape your career. Our training contract aims to give you the best possible start, this is why: * **The level of work you’ll receive aims to prepare you for qualification** \- this puts you in good stead for the realities and expectations of working as a qualified solicitor. With us, you’ll gain invaluable practical experience; * **You’ll receive all the support you need** – as the first law firm to partner with O Shaped we’re proud to create a safe and productive learning environment where you’ll be comfortable to give and receive feedback, discuss your progress, and address the challenges you face (we all have challenges) to ensure we set you up for success. You’ll also have support from our emerging talent team, who you’ll be in contact with right from recruitment until qualification and beyond; * **Inclusivity** – this is at the heart of everything we do, and we want everyone to feel that they have an equal access to opportunities; * **Sponsorship** – we cover the cost of your PPC fees and continue to pay your salary whilst you are studying. **Deadline for Applications** * Please submit your application before 5pm on Friday 6 March 2026\. **Closing date** Friday, 13 February 2026 17:31 (UK time)

title: AI Adoption Strategist Intern
description: Are you passionate about artificial intelligence and its potential to transform how businesses work? Do you want to gain hands\-on experience identifying, integrating, and championing AI tools across a growing digital media platform? Join Babylon as an AI Adoption Strategist Intern (unpaid) and help us leverage AI to streamline workflows, boost content creation, and enhance user experiences. **About Babylon** Babylon is a multicultural media platform providing news, entertainment, and resources for the international community around the world. As we expand our operations across multiple countries, we’re exploring how AI can enhance productivity, creativity, and efficiency across all departments, from editorial and HR to marketing and product development. **About the Role** As an AI Adoption Strategist Intern, you’ll work across teams to identify high\-impact use cases for AI, recommend tools and solutions, and help ensure successful adoption. You’ll act as a bridge between departments and technology, ensuring Babylon stays at the forefront of media innovation. **Key Responsibilities** * Identify internal workflows where AI tools (e.g. Gemini, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, etc.) can improve speed, quality, or consistency * * Research and test AI solutions relevant to content creation, scheduling, analytics, and user interaction * * Create training materials, how\-to guides, and best practices for staff across various departments * * Lead small\-scale pilot projects to test the implementation of AI tools and report outcomes * * Track trends in AI and propose new opportunities for process automation and strategic innovation * * Gather feedback from users and refine strategies for smoother adoption **What You Will Gain** * Real\-world experience integrating AI into business operations * * Exposure to tools for automation, productivity, and generative content * * Insight into change management and digital transformation in a startup\-like environment * * A portfolio of internal case studies, documentation, and strategic recommendations * * Mentorship from digital media and technology professionals * * Flexibility to work around your academic or personal commitments **Who We’re Looking For** * Familiarity with generative AI tools (e.g. Gemini, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, etc.) * * Strong analytical, research, and communication skills * * Curious and proactive mindset with a passion for emerging technologies * * Ability to communicate complex tools in simple, actionable ways * * Able to commit to a 3–6 month internship **Internship Details** * Duration: 3–6 months * * Location: Dublin **How to Apply** If you’re excited about helping a fast\-growing media platform transform using AI, we’d love to hear from you. Send your CV and a short cover letter describing your interest and any relevant experience with AI tools to **info@babylonradio.com** . Help Babylon unlock the full potential of AI, internally and for the communities we serve.

title: AI Data Associate - German
description: **We’re Hiring: ML Data Associates (Level 1\)** 📍 **Location:** Dublin, Ireland 📄 **Contract \-** 3 months with the option of prolonging to another 3 months ***German speakers are preferred*** We are looking for **ML Data Associates (Level 1\)** to join a growing team in Dublin supporting **machine learning and AI data operations** . This role involves reviewing, categorizing, and annotating data to help improve the performance and accuracy of AI systems. 🌍 **Languages Required:** * English (professional proficiency) * **German speakers are preferred** **This position will be responsible for:** * Support effective decision\-making through economic, financial and market analysis of critical issues, including capacity planning, price and cost modeling, and returns on investment. * Support the capacity forecasting, budgeting and reporting efforts for operating expense, capital and resource allocation. * Design and coordinate the development of systems and tools to keep pace with the group’s growing and rapidly changing businesses. **Job Qualifications** * Undergraduate degree in business, finance, engineering, or a related field. A graduate degree (MBA or equivalent) and capacity experience. * Strong analytic skills and a demonstrated ability to build and manage financial models for business forecasting, variance analysis, and problem solving. * Direct experience in operations or capacity planning a plus. * Fluency in standard software including MS Excel. Knowledge of SQL is a strong plus. * Strong communication skills – both written and verbal. * Successful characteristics for the position are the ability to maintain a high level of attention to detail, the ability to work independently, adjust priorities, and work in a continuously changing environment.

title: AI/ML Agent Engineer — Front-End Focus
description: **This job is with eBay, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ\+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly.** At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader \- we're changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We're committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts. Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work \- every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet. Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers \- and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all. ****Role Overview**** We're hiring a Junior AI/ML Agent Engineer with a front\-end focus to build agentic workflows and tools that integrate LLMs, OpenAI specs, MCP, and modern frontend frameworks. You'll collaborate with product and platform teams to deliver intuitive web experiences that harness AI agents for developer and business workflows. ****Key Responsibilities**** * Design and implement agentic workflows demonstrating LLMs (Claude, OpenAI), MCP clients/servers, and OpenAI specifications for tool/function orchestration. * Build user\-facing features in AngularJS and ReactJS, with services and tooling in Node.js and Python for agent integration. * Implement prompt engineering, tool schemas, and function calling patterns; handle context windows, memory, and retrieval strategies for agent reliability. * Integrate agents with developer ecosystems: GitHub (actions, PR comment bots), Cline (AI coding assistant workflows), and Claude model endpoints. * Develop reusable UI components and SDKs for agent invocation, status visualization, and error handling; contribute to design systems and accessibility. * Ship high\-quality code with unit/e2e tests, CI/CD, and observability (logs, metrics, traces) for agent runs and UI flows. * Document architecture, OpenAI/MCP spec contracts, and developer guides for internal consumers. **Minimum Qualifications** * 2\-5 years of professional experience in software engineering with front\-end emphasis. * Hands\-on experience building with LLMs (OpenAI, Claude) and agent/workflow patterns (tools, function calling, retries, guardrails). * Working knowledge of MCP (Model Context Protocol) concepts and implementation of clients/servers. * Proficient in AngularJS and/or ReactJS, plus Node.js and Python for agent backends and tooling. * Familiarity with OpenAI specifications (tool definitions, schemas) and API integration best practices. * Experience integrating with GitHub (Actions, APIs), and exposure to Cline and Claude models and strong fundamentals: TypeScript/JavaScript, REST/GraphQL, testing (Jest/Cypress), linting, and accessibility. **Preferred Qualifications** * Experience with RAG pipelines, embeddings, or lightweight vector stores for context augmentation. * Basic security awareness for agent design: input validation, secrets management, rate limiting, and least\-privilege tokens. * Observability with Datadog/OpenTelemetry or similar for agent runs and UI interactions. * Knowledge of prompt versioning, evaluation (e.g., golden sets), and experiment design. ****What We Value**** * Eagerness to learn and adapt to emerging models/agent frameworks. * Bias for action, pragmatic problem\-solving, and ownership of outcomes. * Clear communication and collaborative mindset across product, design, and infra. ****Salary \& Benefits**** Competitive mid\-level compensation with benefits. Final level and pay depend on experience and interview performance. **How To Apply** Submit your resume, GitHub/portfolio links, and a brief note describing an agent or AI\-enabled feature you've built, including frameworks, models, and evaluation approach **.** **Additional Details** eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines. ]]\>

title: AWS DevOps Engineer – Dublin/Remote (2 days onsite pw)
description: **AWS DevOps Engineer – Dublin/Remote (2 days onsite pw)** My client, based in Dublin City, is a leader in providing technology to Life Science regulatory processes and is continuing to expand its Platform team. They have partnered with IT Search to engage a mid\-level AWS DevOps Engineer to work alongside Engineering Heads and work on complex issues relating to automation, CI/CD, business logic, security and design matters. ***The role:*** * Develop strong internal relationships with Developers and Quality teams to deliver architecture on an ongoing basis, working closely with Architects to execute pipelines * Focus on areas such as security at scale, taking ownership of high quality output across deployment and create/manage/amend CI/CD pipelines to a deep level * Automation through (Python or similar) * There will be some involvement in incident response when required * Evidence based attitude to work, ability to back up ideas and recognise errors and change course accordingly * Proven experience of AWS Services, Pipelining, Kubernetes, Terraform and Python ***Role Requirements:*** * Approximately 5 years of commercial experience in a Platform/DevOps Environment * Ideally have worked in depth with Kubernetes Clusters (maintaining as well as building rather than simply deploying), AWS Services (as a preference), IaC (Terraform ideally), Python/Go on a daily basis for ongoing scripting and automation This is a high potential position with a well\-established firm to join a highly experienced and talented team, with a strong benefits package and work life balance. To learn more, please share your latest CV to arrange a confidential conversation, however, please note we can only accept applications from candidates eligible to work on a permanent basis in Ireland.

title: AWS Platform Engineer
description: **AWS Platform Engineer (CloudFormation)** **Daily Rate Contract (1 day onsite, Dublin City Centre) Ireland or UK** My Dublin based client is seeking an experienced AWS Platform Engineer with strong CloudFormation expertise to join its Cloud Centre of Excellence (CCoE) on a daily rate contract. This role supports a large, highly regulated organisation undergoing significant enterprise cloud transformation. You will play a key role in shaping, building and evolving a modern AWS\-native platform supporting business\-critical workloads at scale. Key Responsibilities * Platform engineering role focused on roadmap delivery and long\-term cloud capability uplift * Work across multiple strategic AWS platform initiatives * Drive cloud\-native innovation, including AI\-native and serverless capabilities * Apply deep AWS expertise within a structured, risk\-aware enterprise environment * Design, build and manage secure, scalable AWS infrastructure using CloudFormation (Infrastructure as Code) * Engineer and enhance a modern AWS cloud platform aligned to enterprise standards * Contribute to platform roadmap initiatives and continuous improvement * Design and deploy serverless and event\-driven architectures * Build AI\-native platform components using AWS managed services * Develop and optimise CI/CD pipelines (CodeBuild, CodePipeline, Step Functions) * Implement monitoring, logging and performance optimisation solutions * Embed DevOps and automation best practices * Drive cost optimisation and operational efficiency * Ensure alignment with security, regulatory and governance requirements * Promote reusable platform patterns and shared services Experience Required * Strong hands\-on AWS experience with deep knowledge of native services * Proven track record delivering resilient, highly available enterprise\-scale cloud platforms * Strong Infrastructure as Code expertise (CloudFormation essential) * Experience writing automation and tooling scripts (Python, Bash or similar) * Solid understanding of AWS networking, IAM, security and governance * Experience building and maintaining AWS\-native CI/CD pipelines * Experience operating in regulated or risk\-aware environments * Comfortable working in Agile teams within a Cloud Centre of Excellence Desirable * AWS Certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer, Developer) * Experience building AI/ML\-enabled AWS platforms * Exposure to platform engineering concepts (self\-service infrastructure, reusable modules, internal developer platforms)

title: Administrative Assistant

We work with clients across the health, fitness, and food industries, providing tailored solutions that meet the highest standards of quality and innovation.This role is broken up into three Customer Service, Purchasing and Reception duties. **Key Responsibilities Customer Service** * Serve as the main liaison between customers and the company, providing excellent service and support. * Manage incoming customer enquiries via phone, email, and online platforms. * Process customer orders accurately and efficiently using the company’s ERP or CRM system. * Coordinate with the production and logistics teams to ensure timely order fulfilment and delivery. * Track and update customers on order status, stock availability, and delivery timelines. * Handle customer complaints or issues in a professional \& solution\-focused manner. * Maintain and update customer records, ensuring data accuracy and compliance with GDPR. * Support the sales team with quotations, sample requests, and account management. * Monitor and report on customer satisfaction metrics and suggest improvements. **Key Responsibilities Purchasing** * Prepare and process purchase orders and related documentation in the ERP system. * Identify and implement cost\-saving opportunities without compromising quality or supply reliability. * Coordinate with logistics and warehouse teams to manage inbound deliveries and resolve discrepancies. * Maintain up\-to\-date purchasing records, supplier files, and pricing databases. * Ensure compliance with company policies, sustainability standards, and regulatory requirements (including food safety and traceability). **Key Responsibilities Receptionist** · Greet visitors and clients in a friendly, professional, and courteous manner · Answer, screen, and direct incoming phone calls promptly · Manage reception area to ensure it is tidy, organized, and presentable · Handle general inquiries and provide accurate information or redirect as appropriate · Manage incoming and outgoing mail, deliveries, and couriers · Follow company policies, procedures, and health \& safety guidelines · Maintain confidentiality of sensitive information at all times In addition to the duties and responsibilities listed above, the job holder may be required to perform other duties as deemed reasonable and necessary by Complex Nutrition. **Academic Background** · Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Outlook, Word). · Experience with ERP/CRM systems (e.g., SAP, Sage, or similar). **Job Experience** · 1\+ years’ experience in a customer service, sales support, or order administration role. · Experience in the food, nutrition, or manufacturing industry an advantage. · Knowledge of logistics and order fulfilment processes an advantage. **Skills** The job demands a good level of: * Strong communication and interpersonal skills. * Excellent organisational and multitasking abilities. * Attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and documentation. * Customer\-focused and solution\-oriented mindset. * Team player with a proactive attitude. * Strong problem\-solving and time management skills. * Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines. * Flexible approach Job Type: Permanent Pay: €30,000\.00 per year Benefits: * On\-site parking Work Location: In person

title: Ads Implementation Specialist - Social/Google
description: Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300\+ million people in 100\+ countries for our industry\-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital\-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world. As an **Ads** **Implementation Specialist** , you’ll support the digital advertising team in the execution of paid ad campaigns across Media Channel (META, TikTok, X, Programatics,..), we are seeking for a candidate with digital marketing background, managing media campaigns across channels. The position is entry level, so you will receive training and upskilling, but having prior experience with Ad platforms is ideal. **Responsibilities:** * Organise \& rename visual files needed for Ad implementations task. (Images, videos, gif,...) following our internal guidance. * Create Asana tickets containing all information necessary for the go\-live of a campaign. * Upload Ad creatives across platforms, ensuring the proper tagging. * Monitor campaigns performance on a daily basis to guarantee delivery and suggest improvements. * Generate ad\-hoc reports on performance or creatives. * Run competitiveness analysis. * Collaborate with cross\-functional teams on creative production, planning and execution. * Monitor industry trends and developments in advertising, while consistently implementing best practices. * Maintain an in\-depth understanding of the company's target audience, product offerings, and advertising objectives. * Ensure campaigns are aligned with data privacy regulations and company policies. **Requirements:** * Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, or a related field. * A minimum of 1 years of experience running Ads on META, TikTok or X. * Good Analytical mindset, results are quantitative. You need to have curiosity for data and understanding ads performance metrics. * CPI, CPR, IPM, VTR are important terms, if you don’t know what they mean don’t apply or learn them before your first interview. * Excellent communication, organizational, and time management skills. * Attention to detail and ability to prioritize tasks effectively. * Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and project management tools. * Previous experience with figma is a plus. * Fluent English speaker. Additional languages are considered a strong asset. **Why Binance** * Shape the future with the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem * Collaborate with world\-class talent in a user\-centric global organization with a flat structure * Tackle unique, fast\-paced projects with autonomy in an innovative environment * Thrive in a results\-driven workplace with opportunities for career growth and continuous learning * Competitive salary and company benefits * Work\-from\-home arrangement (the arrangement may vary depending on the work nature of the business team) Binance is committed to being an equal opportunity employer. We believe that having a diverse workforce is fundamental to our success. *By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our* ***Candidate Privacy Notice*** *.* We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Apps Quality Evaluation Representative - Spanish - CL13
description: **General Information:** ****Job Description**** **Position:** Trust \& Safety New Associate \- CL13 **Location:** Dublin, Ireland **Contract:** Full\-time role 40 hours per week, 12 months contract (with view to extension) **Work Hours:** Must be flexible to work in a 24/7 environment **Training:** Full training will be provided total of 4 weeks when you start. ****Job Description**** Accenture is hiring full\-time employees to work as a Content Reviewer on a fixed\-duration project for one of our global leading clients. Accenture is a trusted, innovative, comprehensive, and experienced partner to leading platform companies. The Trust and Safety offering within Accenture Operations helps keep the internet safe and helps platform companies accelerate, scale, and improve their businesses. As a Content Reviewer, you should have an interest in protecting and improving user experience of consumer products and services. You should be a Team Player, willing to develop a critical understanding of the abuse and policy issues and be comfortable reviewing large volume of apps to help us keep our store policy complaint. - Perform a wide variety of application policy reviews. - Take action on violating apps. - Master policy knowledge to ensure high quality app reviews. Content moderators serve as an important line of defence by helping improve the quality and safety of online content while gaining hands\-on job experience. You will deliver value to our clients, while making a larger impact on society. You will be responsible for analyzing and reviewing user profiles, audio, videos, and text\-based content and/or investigating, escalating and/or resolving issues that are reported by users or flagged by the system. Due to the nature of the role, the individual may be exposed to flashing lights or contrasting light and dark patterns. Content moderation is meaningful work that helps keep the internet safe. It may also be challenging, at times. In the context of this role, individuals may be directly or inadvertently exposed to potentially objectionable and sensitive content (e.g., graphic, violent, sexual, or egregious). Therefore, content moderators need strong resilience and coping skills. We care for the health and well\-being of our people and provide the support and resources needed to perform their role responsibilities. Active participation in Accenture’s well\-being support program, designed specifically for the Trust \& Safety community, provides valuable skills to promote individual and collective well\-being. ****Duties And Responsibilities**** Day\-to\-day responsibilities may include, but are not limited to: - Review, classify and/or remove content according to client guidelines, using specific tools and channels - Perform high quality reviews. - Take quality feedback and work on it. - Maintain the turnaround time on app reviews. - Keep up to date on policy changes. - Provide reverse feedback on policies and apps. - Ability to escalate when needed according to the process. - Understand and remain updated on changing client policies and guidelines - Investigate, resolve, and relay complex content issues to the broader Trust and Safety team - Participate in process improvement initiatives that improve quality and efficiency of work - Participate in continuous training programs and workgroup discussions for optimal development in the role - Engage in conversation around socially sensitive topics with the purpose of keeping our communities safe - Due to the nature of this role, the post holder might regularly be exposed to and have to deal with stroboscopic effect images.\*\* **IMPORTANT** before applying for a job internally (note: the following statements do not apply for jobs in Germany with Works Council representation) **:** - Review this application criteria. - You must already possess the appropriate visas and/or work permits required to live and work in the country the job is based. Do not apply until you have confirmed these authorizations are in place, or the job description states that international applicants will be considered. **Priority Skill** Content Moderation. ****Skills \& Experience**** - Excellent comprehension, communication, and Portuguese language skills - Preferred Bachelor’s Degree in any field. - Should clear basic English language proficiency test. - Computer savvy, technologically capable – especially web browsers, and data entry skills (Able to run virus and spyware scans). - Ability to read and interpret text requests accurately. - Proactive with a strong work ethic. - Adaptable to learning new processes, concepts, and skills. - Demonstrates the ability to work as part of a team adding positive attitude and business focus. - Ability to work in a fast\-paced deadline driven environment. - Ability to manage a team of multi\-cultural analysts in a fast\-paced environment. - Should be able to deal with sensitive material including sexual images, child pornography and hate and violence. - Ability to keep up to date with knowledge of current affairs (specifically American culture). - Should be able to navigate, search and download apps from client play store on the appropriate devices including experience using and downloading Android\-based apps. - Strong coping, emotional resilience, and stress\-management skills - Ability to perform duties objectively, devoid of inherent biases or personal beliefs, in the best interest of client policies - Strong attention to detail - Comfort synthesizing and analyzing information from multiple streams - Strong critical thinking and decision\-making skills - Ability to work differing rotations/shifts and non\-standard work hours - Commitment to quality, efficiency, and effectiveness - Must be over 18 years of age ****Role\-Specific Skills Requirements**** - Problem Solving \& Escalation Management - Customer Interaction - Research Ability - Attention To Detail - Writing Composition - Multi\-tasking - Call/Conversation Management **Eligibility** - 1\-2 years’ experience in a professional work environment. - EU Citizen or Stamp 1G/4 visa (no sponsorship). - Fluency in desired language (and English). - Strong attention to detail to ensure quality of work. - Enthusiastic, positive attitude with a strong willingness to learn. - Good knowledge of internet and associated technologies. - Must be over 18 years of age ****Benefits**** - Working for an international enterprise company - Great training - Company social events - Opportunities for carrier progression ***Please note that a minimum requirement in order to be successful for this role is to have a documented completion of a Leaving Certificate or High School equivalent.*** - Must be comfortable reviewing sensitive content including graphic pornography, violence, drug use, child abuse, etc. The majority of your time will be spent on general content music, sports, beauty, fashion, kids, etc. but you will come across some sensitive content on a weekly basis.\*\* ****About Accenture**** Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security. Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Interactive, Technology and Operations services — all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 674,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities. Visit us at accenture.com **Inclusion and Diversity** Accenture is an equal opportunities employer and welcomes applications from all sections of society and does not discriminate on grounds of race, religion or belief, ethnic or national origin, disability, age citizenship, marital, domestic or civil partnership status, sexual orientation or gender identity. We are a global collective of diverse talents. Innovators improving the way the world works and lives. We provide an accessible, inclusive, open and welcoming workplace that helps everyone make the most of their professional potential. Discover how we are accelerating equality for all in the workplace If you are required to work a night shift as part of this role, you are obliged to complete a night worker health assessment. Please note that it is a requirement of your continued employment, that you are fit to work night shifts. Please advise if you have any particular requirements, so we can look into arranging reasonable adjustments to the recruitment process. You can contact us at accessIErecruitment@accenture.com

title: Architectural Technician
description: Arcadis is the world's leading company delivering sustainable design, engineering, and consultancy solutions for natural and built assets. We are more than 36,000 people, in over 70 countries, dedicated to improving quality of life. Everyone has an important role to play. With the power of many curious minds, together we can solve the world’s most complex challenges and deliver more impact together. **Role description:** We are seeking a Senior Technical team member to join our Dublin as part of our UK and Ireland Architectural Team, with a focus on a diverse range of projects including Healthcare, Education, Transportation and Mixed\-Use development, both locally and across the UK. This challenge will give you the opportunity to focus on a range of projects for a growing, diverse client base. In this position, you will join a highly creative, collaborative team dedicated to innovative problem solving and design excellence. **Role accountabilities:** * You'll be developing, coordinating and leading the detailed design \& construction phases of projects of varying size, delivering high quality technical solutions, leading elements of complex large and small projects independently and within a team. * Work on all aspects of project delivery \- detailed design development, working drawings, contract administration and on\-site services. * Resolve complex technical and detailed design issues. * Maintain the project documentation, drawings and specifications * Conduct on\-site inspections and document site reviews * Process change control requests during construction and address RFI * Understand and adhere to procedures including quality management and environmental management systems and health \& safety * Promotes the use and continuous development of appropriate systems, procedures and protocols * Supporting the project team with input to programming, resourcing and financial reviews * Work collaboratively with the team and support junior members of staff **Qualifications \& Experience:** * Your sector experience would ideally include recent exposure to health, education and scientific projects in the UK * Ideally MCIAT or regionally equivalent accredited * Experience of working on larger projects as part of a team and day to day leadership for smaller projects * Exemplary Revit ability and experience of complex BIM level 2 projects * Naturally you’ll have a strong knowledge of building regulations, design standards and best practice * Strong organisational skills as well as advanced written / verbal communication skills Why Arcadis? We can only achieve our goals when everyone is empowered to be their best. We believe everyone's contribution matters. It’s why we are pioneering a skills\-based approach, where you can harness your unique experience and expertise to carve your career path and maximize the impact we can make together. You’ll do meaningful work, and no matter what role, you’ll be helping to deliver sustainable solutions for a more prosperous planet. Make your mark, on your career, your colleagues, your clients, your life and the world around you. Together, we can create a lasting legacy. Join Arcadis. Create a Legacy. Our Commitment to Equality, Diversity, Inclusion \& Belonging We want you to be able to bring your best self to work every day which is why we take equality and inclusion seriously and hold ourselves to account for our actions. Our ambition is to be an employer of choice and provide a great place to work for all our people. We believe that by working together diverse people with different experiences develop the most innovative ideas. Equality, diversity and inclusion is at the heart of how we improve quality of life and we work closely with our people across six ED\&I Workstreams: Age, Disability, Faith, Gender, LGBT\+ and Race. A diverse and skilled workforce is essential to our success.

title: Assoc Dir, Sourcing
description: **Job Description** **We are seeking a strategic sourcing leader to join the Supply Chain team as Associate Director of Sourcing \& Contracting. This role is central to developing and executing sourcing strategies for direct materials in the Drug Substance, Drug Product or Packaging categories. The successful candidate will develop category strategies and lead cross\-functional sourcing projects, align market intelligence with business needs, and drive supplier selection. They will lead contract negotiations to optimize overall value, service levels and risk mitigation. The role requires strong collaboration across functions such as Procurement, Supply Chain, Legal, Finance, Quality, Technical Operations, and EHSS to deliver value\-driven outcomes and ensure a resilient, sustainable, compliant, and competitive sourcing \& contracting framework.** **Responsibilities** * Lead sourcing activities with cross\-functional teams in developing and executing sourcing projects. * Define, build and plan alignment on category strategies for Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (API), Drug Product or Packaging. * Work with Supply Chain leadership in the establishment, communication, and implementation of business goals and objectives. * Partner with Supply Chain, R\&D, Procurement, Legal, Finance, Quality, Technical Operations, EHSS, and other functions as required across the internal network, to deliver value\-driven sourcing outcomes aligned with business goals. * Develop and implement sourcing strategies in key sourcing categories that results in a sustainable competitive advantage. * Gather Market Intelligence and trends from third party contract manufacturers. * Build alignment between business needs and market dynamics. * Implement the strategic direction for Supply Chain Sourcing efforts and execute tactical and strategic sourcing processes. * Achieve optimal balance between collaborative engagement with suppliers and competitive pressure, to ensure maximum value is realised. * Guide internal stakeholders through a data\-driven supplier selection process. * Manage the contracting process for commercial contracting activities associated with Alkermes proprietary commercial and pipeline products. Support contract negotiations to optimize overall value including financial outcomes, service levels and risk mitigation. * Monitor contracts and pro\-actively manage contracting activities with close\-out, extension, or renewal according to what’s best for the company * Prepare and draft contracts in collaboration with the contract business owners and legal teams * Standardize contract terms across supplier categories * Develop and implement a standard sourcing process appropriate for Alkermes sourcing of direct goods and services need and aligned with Global strategic sourcing policy. * Establish and support a work environment of continuous improvement that supports the company Policies and systems, and appropriate regulations in Pharma. * Assist with the preparation and management of departmental budgets. * Builds strategic and trusting relationships through demonstrated technical capability, critical thinking, and collaborative behaviours. * hybrid role **Qualifications** * Established business qualification with related experience. * Masters in a Supply Chain or Business\-related field preferred but not required. * 5 years progressive experience in pharma, with API, DS, DP experience desirable. * Strong experience in conducting sourcing projects from inception to execution * Experience in contract development \& negotiation with demonstrated delivered value. * Experience working in a regulated industry with quality management system is desirable, including general knowledge of GMP and CFR’s. * Proven leadership skills – ability to influence and motivate others to quickly achieve results. * High energy and passion for excellence. * Self\-confident with an ability to accept and respond to challenges in a positive manner. * Strong verbal and written communication skills, including workshop facilitation experience. * Ability to effectively present complex topics in a concise manner. * Effective negotiation experience. * Positive attitude, strong collaboration and interpersonal skills required to effectively address problems and interface with other functional areas while working in a global environment. * Position based in Ireland. Travel domestic and international – up to 20%.

title: Associate Recruiter
description: **Sustainable Talent** is partnering with **MongoDB,** a global leader in data solutions, to find a talented and results\-driven **Associate Recruiter** to support our client in **Dublin, Ireland**. This a **contract role** with **hybrid** work options, requiring 2\-3 days per week in the office. As an **Associate Recruiter** on our client's **Talent Discovery team**, you will have the unique opportunity to become a hiring subject matter expert across all areas of our business, recruiting for technical to non\-technical roles alike. Pivoting to support critical positions as they arise across the company, Associate Recruiters will focus on both passive talent sourcing as well as full\-lifecycle recruiting. In this role, you will be expected to quickly upskill in new role profiles while maintaining a constant focus on cultivating a robust pipeline of aligned talent as an expert in numerous impactful sourcing tactics. This opportunity is ideal for individuals who embrace change, thrive in a dynamic, ever\-evolving environment, and are excited to advance their career in technical recruiting. **What you will do:** * Support critical MongoDB roles through strategic passive talent sourcing, quickly pivoting to support new areas of MongoDB's business as hiring needs arise. * Provide full lifecycle recruitment support for a variety of positions across the company, ranging from highly niche technical roles to non\-technical functions. * Work closely with hiring managers to understand business needs and deliver qualified talent accordingly, becoming an expert in the external market and a consultative talent advisor for business stakeholders. * Partner with coordinators, hiring managers and interviewers to deliver an exceptional candidate experience, maintaining a high\-touch and personalized process for all candidates. * Support an equitable and inclusive hiring process for all candidates by educating stakeholders on hiring best practices and unconscious bias in decision\-making. * Conduct talent mapping, competitive intelligence research, and focused pipelining to support ever\-changing business needs. * Help build and evolve our long\-term candidate engagement strategies at MongoDB, maintaining ongoing contact with a broad talent community of prospects for consideration for future rules. **What we need to see:** * Have a passion and excitement for building a career in technical recruiting; expertise in passive candidate sourcing for either technical or sales\-focused roles is preferred but not required. Previous experience in a technology\-focused organization is a plus. * Showcase a strong knowledge of robust sourcing tactics and best practices to identify a broad top\-of\-funnel pipeline. * Maintain creative and out\-of\-the\-box sourcing techniques to tap into new pools of talent, while uncovering new tactics through research and knowledge\-sharing with peers. * Have an analytical mindset, with the ability to conduct autonomous research and utilize data to inform strategy and influence stakeholders. * Exhibit exceptional organizational and time\-management skills, with previous experience in high\-volume business environments. A proven ability to juggle multiple competing priorities simultaneously while navigating ambiguity is required for role success. * Maintain exceptional written and verbal communication, with business\-level fluency in English. * Proficiency working in Greenhouse and Gem is preferred, but not required. *Sustainable Talent is a M/F\+, disabled, and veteran equal employment opportunity and affirmative action employer.*

academic publishing, peer review, or scientific writing * Familiarity with computational biology tools or bioinformatics pipelines * Experience designing or evaluating research problems in an academic or industry setting **Why Join Us** * Work on cutting\-edge AI projects alongside the world's leading research labs * Fully remote and flexible — structure your hours around your life, not the other title: Clinical Lecturer – Neurosurgery
